title: Minesweeper
description: Play Minesweeper free online. Clear the board without hitting mines. Three difficulty levels. Runs entirely in your browser — no download needed.
hint: Click to reveal · Right-click or long-press to flag

howToUse.label: Choose difficulty
howToUse.description: Select Easy (9×9, 10 mines), Medium (16×16, 40 mines), or Hard (16×30, 99 mines).

howToUse.label: Reveal cells
howToUse.description: Click (or tap) a cell to reveal it. Numbers show how many mines are adjacent.

howToUse.label: Flag mines
howToUse.description: Right-click (or long-press on mobile) to place or remove a flag on a suspected mine.

howToUse.label: Win
howToUse.description: Reveal all non-mine cells to win. The first click is always safe.

faq.question: Is the first click always safe?
faq.answer: Yes. Mines are placed after your first click, guaranteeing the clicked cell and its neighbors are mine-free.

faq.question: What do the numbers mean?
faq.answer: Each number shows how many of the 8 surrounding cells contain a mine. Use this to deduce safe cells and mine locations.

faq.question: How do I flag a mine on mobile?
faq.answer: Long-press a cell (hold for about half a second) to place or remove a flag.

faq.question: Is my best time saved?
faq.answer: Yes. Your best time for each difficulty is saved in your browser's local storage.

faq.question: What happens if I click a mine?
faq.answer: All mines are revealed and the game ends. Click New Game to start a fresh board.
